query:
SELECT s.id, s.name, COUNT(p.id) as product_count 
FROM subcategories s 
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.subcategoryId = s.id 
WHERE s.name LIKE '%Fruit Mochi%' OR s.name LIKE '%水果%'
GROUP BY s.id, s.name;
